calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Seventh Cause Of Action For Wrongful Eviction
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs ROGER SUN, ELAINE HUANG's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The Seventh Cause Of Action For Wrongful Eviction is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a cause of action for common law wrongful eviction only. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
